zh.lifeSummary: 當Katherine Parton of Sharrington於1422年出生在英國英格蘭諾福爾可沙利頓時，她的父親Sir William Parton of Sharrington23歲，母親Katherine Parton22歲。她於1444年與Richard D’Irmingland在英國諾福爾可沙利頓結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1474年在她的家鄉享年53歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾福爾可沙利頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Katherine Parton of Sharrington于1422年出生在英国英格兰諾福爾可沙利頓时，她的父亲Sir William Parton of Sharrington23岁，母亲Katherine Parton22岁。她于1444年与Richard D’Irmingland在英国諾福爾可沙利頓结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1474年在她的家乡享年53岁，埋葬在英国英格兰諾福爾可沙利頓。

nameMeanings.name: Parton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (mainly West Midlands): habitational name from any of various places called Parton; most are named with Old English peretūn ‘pear orchard’ (a compound of pere ‘pear’ + tūn ‘enclosure’, with later change of -er- to -ar-, a regular phonetic development in Middle English). There are examples in Gloucestershire, two in Cumbria, and one in Kircudbrightshire, Scotland.

variants.name: Partain
meanings: English: probably a variant of   Parton  .

variants.name: Parten
meanings: German: variant of Parthen, from the personal name Part(h)en, ultimately derived from Greek Parthenios, from parthenos ‘virginal, pure, undefiled’. This was a name borne by two martyrs of the early Christian Church. The surname Parten is very rare in Germany.
English: variant of   Parton  . This surname is very rare in Britain.
Norwegian: habitational name from the farm name Parten in northern Norway, the definite form singular of part ‘part, parcel (of a property)’. This surname is very rare in Norway.

nameMeanings.name: Katherine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of   Christopher ;  also of   Katherine   and its variants. In the medieval period it was a pet form of   Christian   and   Christiana .

variants.name: Christopher
meanings: From the Greek name Khristophoros, from Khristos ‘Christ’ + pherein ‘to bear’. This was popular among early Christians, conscious of the fact that they were metaphorically bearing Christ in their hearts. A later, over-literal interpretation of the name gave rise to the legend of a saint who actually bore the Christ-child over a stream; he is regarded as the patron of travellers. In England the name was uncommon in the Middle Ages, but became very popular in the 16th century, especially in parts of the North.

en.lifeSummary: When Katherine Parton of Sharrington was born in 1422, in Sharrington, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir William Parton of Sharrington, was 23 and her mother, Katherine Parton, was 22. She married Richard D’Irmingland in 1444, in Sharrington, Norfolk, England. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died about 1474, in her hometown, at the age of 53, and was buried in Sharrington, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Katherine Parton of Sharrington est née en 1422, à Sharrington, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir William Parton of Sharrington, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Katherine Parton, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Richard D’Irmingland en 1444, à Sharrington, Norfolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée environ 1474, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 53 ans, et a été enterrée à Sharrington, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Katherine Parton of Sharrington 1422 in Sharrington, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir William Parton of Sharrington 23 und ihre Mutter Katherine Parton 22. Sie hat 1444 in Sharrington, Norfolk, England Richard D’Irmingland geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. ja.lifeSummary: Katherine Parton of Sharringtonが1422年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクシャリントンで生まれた時，父Sir William Parton of Sharringtonは23歳，母Katherine Partonは22歳であった。1444年にイギリスノーフォルクシャリントンでRichard D’Irminglandと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1474年に故郷で53歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノーフォルクシャリントンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Katherine Parton of Sharrington(이)가 1422년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 샤링턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir William Parton of Sharrington(은)는 23세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Katherine Parton(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1444년 영국 노르폴크 샤링턴에서 Richard D’Irmingland(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1474년 그녀의 고향에서 53세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 샤링턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Katherine Parton of Sharrington nasceu em 1422, em Sharrington, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir William Parton of Sharrington, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Katherine Parton, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com Richard D’Irmingland em 1444, em Sharrington, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Katherine Parton of Sharrington родилась в 1422 г. в местности шаррингтон, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir William Parton of Sharrington было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Katherine Parton, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard D’Irmingland в 1444 г. в местности шаррингтон, норфолк, Англия. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла около 1474 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 53 лет и была похоронена в местности шаррингтон, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания.
